dashboard.desc.basic_not_ready: Basic setup is not complete. The system cannot perform full analysis yet.
dashboard.desc.basic_ready: The system is ready for analysis. Consider completing family info and style settings.
dashboard.desc.full_ready: All major settings are configured. The system is continuously analyzing surveillance video.
dashboard.alert.basic_not_ready.title: Basic setup incomplete
dashboard.alert.basic_not_ready.desc: The system cannot perform full analysis. Please continue the setup.
dashboard.alert.provider_error.title: Provider Error
dashboard.alert.provider_error.desc: The model service is unavailable, which may affect analysis and daily summary generation.
dashboard.alert.video_source_error.title: Video Source Error
dashboard.alert.video_source_error.desc: Video source configuration is incomplete or validation failed. Scanning may not work.
dashboard.alert.daily_summary_error.desc: The latest daily summary generation failed. Please check logs and retry.
dashboard.alert.analysis_task_error.desc: {count} analysis tasks failed in the last 24 hours
provider.capability_required: Provider must have at least one capability enabled
provider.in_use: Provider is currently in use by: {roles}
provider.has_references: Provider has historical references and cannot be deleted
entity.unsupported_image_format: Unsupported image format. Please upload JPG/PNG/WebP.
entity.image_process_failed: Image processing failed. Please try again.
entity.upload_image_first: Please upload an image before generating appearance description
entity.no_vision_provider: No vision model configured. Please set one up in LLM settings.
entity.image_read_failed: Failed to read image. Please try again.
entity.ai_no_result: AI did not return a valid description. Please try again.
session.is_open: Session is open and cannot be analyzed yet
task.cannot_delete_active: Running or pending task cannot be deleted
task.only_active_can_stop: Only pending or running tasks can be stopped
task.full_build_running: Full build is already running for this source
media.physical_file_not_found: Physical file not found on disk
